title: haplopappus integrifolius subsp. liatriformis
intro: Haplopappus integrifolius subsp. liatriformis, also known as a type of shrubby bush sunflower, is a plant species native to South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Haplopappus integrifolius subsp. liatriformis include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds and flu, as well as to support overall well-being.
